CustomField.description: Formula field. For Fixed-Length Recurring Donations, calculates the total expected amount across all installments based on Schedule Type. Returns 0 for Open-Ended Recurring Donations since they have no defined end.
CustomField.formula: IF(TEXT( Open_Ended_Status__c) = $Label.RecurringDonationOpenStatus, 0, CASE( Schedule_Type__c , "Multiply By", Installments__c * Amount__c , "Divide By",Amount__c ,0 ))
CustomField.inlineHelpText: The total expected amount for all installments combined. Only applicable to Fixed-Length recurring donations; shows 0 for Open-Ended donations.
CustomField.label: Total
